creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Andriy Gapon from comment #3)

> $ procstat -t 40832
>   PID    TID COMM                TDNAME              CPU  PRI STATE   WCHAN    
> 40832 101728 sync                -                    -1  120 sleep   tx->tx_s  

> $ procstat -t 88582
>   PID    TID COMM                TDNAME              CPU  PRI STATE   WCHAN    
> 88582 103868 sync                -                    -1  120 sleep   tx->tx_s
